elements.text:
Your roommates have some strong opinions and you don't always agree with them. One evening, you invite a friend over for dinner and sense some possible tension. 

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: Even if my roommates say something that's upsetting, my friend and I can talk about it later.
My friend will be my friend no matter what my roommates think.
If my roommates say things that I don't agree with, they're still my roommates and I love living with them.
We will be able to discuss the different opinions thoughtfully.
My rommates will say something that makes my friend hate me.
